# Laos Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Laos's administrative hierarchy:
> 18 provinces, 148 districts, 13,330 villages.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total provinces: 18
- Total districts: 148
- Total villages: 13,330
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All provinces (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-province.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All villages (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-village.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Province

- [Attapeu](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/attapeu-at/) — 4 districts, 213 villages
- [Bokeo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bokeo-bk/) — 5 districts, 345 villages
- [Bolikhamsai](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bolikhamsai-bl/) — 7 districts, 487 villages
- [Champasak](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/champasak-ch/) — 11 districts, 1068 villages
- [Houaphan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/houaphan-ho/) — 9 districts, 1003 villages
- [Khammouane](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/khammouane-kh/) — 9 districts, 778 villages
- [Luang Namtha](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/luang-namtha-lm/) — 5 districts, 465 villages
- [Luang Prabang](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/luang-prabang-lp/) — 11 districts, 1373 villages
- [Oudomxay](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/oudomxay-ou/) — 7 districts, 889 villages
- [Phongsaly](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/phongsaly-ph/) — 7 districts, 794 villages
- [Salavan](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/salavan-sl/) — 8 districts, 776 villages
- [Savannakhet](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/savannakhet-sv/) — 16 districts, 1634 villages
- [Vientiane Province](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/vientiane-province-vi/) — 11 districts, 597 villages
- [Vientiane Capital](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/vientiane-capital-vt/) — 9 districts, 334 villages
- [Xaignabouli](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/xaignabouli-xa/) — 11 districts, 610 villages
- [Xekong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/xekong-xe/) — 4 districts, 386 villages
- [Xiangkhouang](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/xiangkhouang-xi/) — 9 districts, 1384 villages
- [Xaisomboun](https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/xaisomboun-xn/) — 5 districts, 194 villages

- [Luang Prabang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/luang-prabang-lp.txt)
- [Oudomxay](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/oudomxay-ou.txt)
- [Phongsaly](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/phongsaly-ph.txt)
- [Salavan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/salavan-sl.txt)
- [Savannakhet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/savannakhet-sv.txt)
- [Vientiane Province](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/vientiane-province-vi.txt)
- [Vientiane Capital](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/vientiane-capital-vt.txt)
- [Xaignabouli](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/xaignabouli-xa.txt)
- [Xekong](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/xekong-xe.txt)
- [Xiangkhouang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/xiangkhouang-xi.txt)
- [Xaisomboun](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/xaisomboun-xn.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (province), 2 (district), 3 (village)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Laos Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/laos-administrative-divisions
